name: Aenugu Manish Reddy
summary: Final-year Computer Science undergraduate with hands-on experience in Web Development, Blockchain, and Artificial Intelligence. Demonstrates strong problem-solving and prototyping abilities, evidenced by multiple wins at regional and national hackathons. Skilled in a range of technologies including React, Python, and smart contracts, with a proven capacity for rapid learning and teamwork. Seeking challenging opportunities in software development and emerging technologies.

projects.title: Procto Plus
bullets: Developed a system to revolutionize virtual assessments with enhanced security and integrity through blockchain innovation.

projects.title: PharmaChain
bullets: Developing a blockchain-powered healthcare system with AI integration for secure health records, drug authenticity, and fraud prevention.
Building impactful solutions using AI with Python, DevOps, and region-specific datasets.
Led blockchain advocacy on campus, driving student engagement through events and strategic networking to connect innovation with emerging tech leaders.

name: Vedhin Govind
summary: Computer Science student with demonstrated expertise in full-stack web development using JavaScript, Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB. Proven ability to architect and launch complex applications, including an AI-powered news platform and a hotel management system, achieving high uptime and performance. Possesses strong foundational skills in data structures, algorithms, and machine learning, complemented by leadership experience in mentoring students and managing technical workshops.

projects.title: Hotel Management Portal
bullets: Architected a full-stack hotel management system with secure authentication and dynamic routing, serving 100+ listings and 500+ user reviews.
Engineered robust MongoDB schemas and RESTful APIs with middleware validation, ensuring 99% uptime and seamless data integrity.
Optimized database queries and implemented caching strategies, improving application response time by 35%.

projects.title: Business Digest – AI-Powered Briefing Engine
bullets: Spearheaded development of an AI-powered news aggregation platform, integrating Groq LLM and GNews API to deliver personalized business insights.
Architected secure backend infrastructure with Node.js and MongoDB, implementing OAuth authentication for 500+ users.
Designed scalable RESTful APIs supporting a React + TypeScript frontend for real-time competitor analysis and trend forecasting.

projects.title: Community Crop Exchange Platform
bullets: Engineered a collaborative agricultural platform connecting 200+ farmers, reducing crop wastage by 40% through optimized resource sharing.
Implemented a WebSocket-based real-time communication system, accelerating trade negotiations by 60%.
Developed location-aware filtering algorithms and secure authentication protocols to streamline resource discovery.
Spearheaded technical initiatives, orchestrating 10+ workshops and hackathons that enhanced web development skills for 700+ students.
Forged strategic partnerships with industry professionals and faculty to secure mentorship and real-world project opportunities.
Mentored 40+ first-year students in C programming fundamentals, developing a comprehensive curriculum that improved coding proficiency by 85%.
